home.description: A community of 800+ builders, a project lab, research, and events helping LatAm shippers meet, learn, and build in public.

workPreview.title: Launch with the builders you actually want to reach.
workPreview.description: We design hackathons, Code Brews, workshops, product launches, content, and community activations for teams that want real LatAm adoption, not vanity impressions.

collaborations.description: Collaborated with teams and ecosystems including devtools, AI labs, fintech startups, and infrastructure companies.

communityPreview.title: The best LatAm builders are already shipping.
communityPreview.description: Crafter Station exists to connect them, celebrate their work, and help more people build in public with taste, speed, and ambition.

eventsResearch.researchDescription: We research AI-first engineering, agents, developer experience, product workflows, and the systems that help teams ship with AI.

communityQr.title: Scan to join crafters.chat.
communityQr.description: The WhatsApp-first home for LatAm builders shipping products, finding collaborators, sharing events, and building in public.

instagram.title: See the rooms, demos, and builders we are shipping with.
instagram.description: Follow @crafter.station and our YouTube channel for event recaps, community moments, builder spotlights, and the work we are shipping across LatAm.

openCalendars.title: Book free 30-minute time with a Crafter Station member.
openCalendars.description: You can book mentorship, career advice, product feedback, or a calm conversation with any Crafter Station member. This is how we give back to the community that made the network possible.
openCalendars.instructions: Go to the team page, pick a member, and use the calendar on their profile.

footer.copyright: © {year} Crafter Station. Built fast, built well.

work-with-us.title: Work with the team behind Crafter Station.
work-with-us.description: For companies that want senior product execution, LatAm community activations, event partnerships, product collaborations, and high-signal builder access.
work-with-us.sectionDescription: Every collaboration is shaped around the product, audience, timing, and trust required.

events.title: Code Brews, hackathons, launches, and workshops across LatAm.
events.description: Events are how we turn online community into real trust. We host formats that help builders meet, learn, demo, and ship together.
events.section: Built for participation, not passive attendance.
events.sectionDescription: We design events around builders doing the work: trying products, shipping demos, sharing lessons, and meeting collaborators.
events.noEvents: [*] No events found. Check back soon.

events-sponsors.title: Sponsor Crafter Station hackathons, meetups, and builder rooms.
events-sponsors.description: Partner with Crafter Station to support high-signal events where LatAm builders try products, ship demos, meet collaborators, and remember the companies that showed up.
events-sponsors.section: For companies that want more than a logo.
events-sponsors.sectionDescription: We work with sponsors on hackathons, Code Brews, workshops, product launches, prizes, venue support, food, developer tools, and hands-on activations.

projects.title: Projects we ship to learn, teach, and prove the work.
projects.description: Our projects span event infrastructure, legal data, voice interfaces, AI-native tools, open-source releases, design systems, code search, and community playbooks.
projects.githubTitle: We build in public when the work should be inspectable.
projects.githubDescription: The Crafter Station GitHub organization is where we publish open-source products, community infrastructure, experiments, and reusable engineering artifacts. Some projects are full products, some are public datasets, and some are the raw material behind the work we ship.
projects.sectionDescription: Some projects are hosted products, some are open source, some are playbooks, and some are community infrastructure. Open-source projects are tagged in the catalog.
projects.nextTitle: Help choose what the community should build next.
projects.nextDescription: We run a realtime, community-ranked project board for requests, experiments, and useful ideas the network can work on together. Submit an idea, vote on the queue, and watch priorities move live.

research.title: Researching the systems behind better shipping.
research.description: Crafter Research explores AI-first engineering, agents, developer experience, and the practices that help modern teams build with more leverage.
research.section: For now, research lives on its own domain.
research.sectionDescription: This page features the unit and links to the active research site and GitHub organization.

team.title: The people growing the shipping culture.
team.description: Crafter Station is built by engineers, designers, researchers, marketers, product people, operators, and community organizers across Latin America.
team.sectionDescription: The team combines product engineering, AI, design systems, backend, data, growth, automation, project management, and community building.
team.calendarTitle: Book free 30-minute time with a Crafter Station member.
team.calendarDescription: You can book mentorship, career advice, product feedback, or a calm conversation with any Crafter Station member. This is how we give back to the community that made the network possible.
team.calendarInstructions: Go to the team page, pick a member, and use the calendar on their profile.

blog.title: Stories about shipping, AI, community, and product craft.
blog.description: The unified blog will collect lessons from Crafter Station, Crafter Research, open-source launches, hackathons, and the LatAm community.
blog.section: Start with the philosophy and research.
blog.sectionDescription: The full content migration can come next. For now, this page points to the most important writing surfaces.

brand.title: Crafter Station brand assets and usage.
brand.description: Use this page when referencing Crafter Station in articles, presentations, event pages, or partner materials.
brand.sectionDescription: The asset download section can be expanded when final logos are migrated from the old site.

contact.title: Start with the right path.
contact.description: Tell us whether you want to partner, build, host an event, sponsor a hackathon, or join the community.
contact.section: What are you trying to do?
contact.sectionDescription: Choose the type of conversation and we will reply with the fastest path to start.

next.title: Vote on the next thing we should craft.
next.description: A live, community-ranked queue for project ideas the community can work on. Submit anonymously, leave an alias if you want, and move the best ideas up in realtime.

workshopQuestions.title: Ask the questions we should answer live.
workshopQuestions.description: A realtime workshop queue where attendees submit validated questions, add their name, and vote the most useful topics to the top.

opencodeQuestions.title: Ask Anthony about building with OpenCode.
opencodeQuestions.description: Submit your OpenCode questions and vote on what Anthony should answer live during the workshop.

n8nQuestions.title: Ask Javo about n8n MCP + Claude Code automations.
n8nQuestions.description: Submit your questions about n8n, MCP servers, Claude Code, automation, and flows. Vote on what Javo should answer live during the presentation.

claudeCodeQuestions.title: Ask Shiara about building with Claude Code.
claudeCodeQuestions.description: Submit your Claude Code questions and vote on what Shiara should answer live during the workshop.

member.calendarSub: Schedule a mentoring session, career advice, product feedback, or a chill chat.

teamWorkCallout.title: Need the team behind Crafter Station?
teamWorkCallout.description: For product engineering, event partnerships, community activations, and LatAm growth collaborations, start here.

cta.title: Build with the LatAm shipping network
cta.description: Join the community, come to an event, follow the projects, or partner with us on the next room full of builders.
cta.successDescription: We'll be in touch shortly. Thanks for reaching out.
cta.genericError: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
cta.networkError: Network error. Try again in a moment.
